name: Akshay Roongta
body: Akshay is the co-founder of Dots, an Ooloi Labs spin-off that turns scattered user feedback into structured, traceable insights so decisions rest on evidence rather than guesswork. He co-founded Ooloi Labs in 2019 and has spent years building tools for how collectives work together. Off screen he thinks about qualitative data, amateur birding, and books.
